canonical_action: replace the priority-heap scheduler with a simple round-robin scheduler to cut complexity
closure_reason: round-robin gave every job an equal turn share with no priority edge, so SLA-critical jobs got starved behind low-priority jobs during peak load
measured_outcome: cut scheduler code size by about half and simplified testing, but during a peak-load drill SLA-critical job P95 latency went from about 2s to over 40s; rolled back right after the drill
